summary_text: ### 修正対象 `scripts/fugue-execute.mjs` ### 修正内容（diff形式） ```diff diff --git a/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs b/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs index 9f0a13ca..30d46928 100644 --- a/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs +++ b/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs @@ -5,6 +5,7 @@ import { createHash, randomUUID } from "node:crypto"; import os from "node:os"; import path from "node:path"; import process from "node:process"; +import idempotencyModule from "./lib/idempotency.js"; import outputFilterModule from "./lib/output-filter.js"; const HOME = os.homedir(); @@ -17,6 +18,7 @@ const PROVIDER_STATE = path.join(STATE_DIR, "fugue-provider-state.json"); const PHASE_EVIDENCE = path.join(STATE_DIR, "phase-evidence.jsonl"); const BRIDGE = path.join(SCRIPT_DIR, "fugue-lane-bridge.mjs"); const VOTE = path.join(SCRIPT_DIR, "consensus-vote.js"); +const { checkCache, storeCache, DEFAULT_TTL_MS } = idempotencyModule; const { redactSecrets } = outputFilterModule; function usage(exitCode = 1) { @@ -512,8 +514,12 @@ async function continueRun(runState) { let feedback = ""; for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 3; attempt += 1) { const implSpec = implementationMatrix(state, feedback); + const implCacheKey = createHash("sha256").update([state.task, String(state.tier), state.project].join("\0")).digest("hex"); + const implCache = checkCache(implCacheKey, DEFAULT_TTL_MS); const changedBefore = await listChangedFiles(state.project); - const implementation = await runBridge(state, state.tier <= 1 ? "single" : "matrix", implSpec); + // Dedup identical implementation requests for 5 minutes so rapid retries reuse the last successful bridge output. + const implementation = implCache.hit ? implCache.data : await runBridge(state, state.tier <= 1 ? "single" : "matrix", implSpec); + if (!implCache.hit && implementation.ok) storeCache(implCacheKey, implementation); const changedAfter = await listChangedFiles(state.project); state = saveState(state, { phase: "implementation", ``` ### 検証結果 `node --check scripts/fugue-execute.mjs` は成功しました。 仮定: `./lib/idempotency.js` は CommonJS ですが、現行Node実行環境では `mjs` から default import で利用可能という前提で実装しています。
